name_cn:
Genuine Quality
5DN006🔥New Envelope Crossbody Bag, top-grade imported calfskin, unique shoulder strap, limited edition colorful strap and leather splicing, full of highlights, interior MIU logo heat-pressed text💞Multiple card slots, versatile usage, can be worn crossbody, as a clutch, as a wallet, or as an accessory for a larger bag,💅💅Size: 19 X 10 X 2 cm, comes with original packaging
